options.name: -box
options.description: specifies the box of PG cover cell

options.name: -cell
options.description: specifies the PG cover cell name

options.name: -lef_file
options.description: specifies the LEF file name that will be saved of the PG cover cell. The CLASS of the cell is COVER

options.name: -routing_layers
options.description: specifies the layers that reserved for PG routing including the cut layers
